body:
**Scope:** finalize the placement record M2 deferred (0004 Open questions; `chunkstore-grpc/src/fanout.rs:9-12` — *"the recorded-placement question is settled at M3"*). Today the chunk map is `ChunkRef { id, scheme, len }` (`core/src/metadata.rs:73-80`) with **no location**, and the fan-out routes statelessly by `index % n` (`fanout.rs:51-53`) — which breaks the moment a custodian moves a fragment. Record, per fragment index, the **stable D-server id** holding it; write path records it at commit, read path consumes it (retire `index % n`). Introduce a **stable D-server id** (URLs rebind/NAT): registration through `Coordination` carries `{ id, endpoint, failure-domain label }`; discovery resolves `id → current endpoint`.

**Definition of done**
- [ ] an `rs(6,3)` write records per-fragment placement (stable D-server id) in the chunk map at the commit point
- [ ] the read path resolves fragments from the record (not `index % n`), incl. after a process restart
- [ ] D-server registration carries a stable id + failure-domain label; discovery maps id → current endpoint
- [ ] M0/M1/M2 suites still green (placement is additive to a never-deployed schema)

**Needs:** — (foundation; M2 complete). **Refs:** proposal 0005 §"The placement record"; architecture §6.1, §7.3; ADR-0015.

milestone.title: M3 — Custodians
milestone.description: The self-maintaining durability plane (L4): GC, scrub, reconstruction, rebalance + durability telemetry. Makes single-zone trustworthy; gates the Step-2 release. Plan: proposal 0005.

title: M3.1 — Placement record + stable D-server id (record at commit; retire index%n)
